failures.description: The required catalog search dependency timed out, preventing the agent from obtaining the count of available Mechanical Keyboard products.
failures.checklist_reasoning: At index 3, the agent attempted the required ProductCatalogSearch call with well-formed arguments. The tool returned an explicit infrastructure/connectivity-style error: CatalogServiceTimeoutError, stating the catalog search dependency timed out after 30000ms. This is not a malformed invocation, guardrail block, or misunderstanding of the user request. The failure was not resolved later; the Executor only reported that the task could not be completed.
